name: Geolocation-based redirect
short_descr: Redirect to the server, configured for the user's country (using Geo-IP)
long_descr:
Redirect user to the home server. It compares user country code (from Geo-IP data) with configured (as variables) countries, in case of match it redirects to corresponding URL, otherwise to DEFAULT.
Please use ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (two capital letters) country codes.

params.name: DEFAULT
params.descr: Default URL, when user country doesn't match

name: GitHub artifact
long_descr: Call the application like <app_URL>/?branch=<branch>&artifact=<artifact_name>. The app will get specified artifact from latest successful build of <branch> branch of <REPO> GitHub repository

name: Markdown renderer
short_descr: This application converts Markdown document to HTML, optionally applying CSS
long_descr: Call the application like <app_URL>/<relative_path_to_markdown>. The app will get Markdown document from <BASE>/<relative_path_to_markdown> and convert it to HTML. You can specify styles in <HEAD> variable, its content will be added to <head> tag

params.name: BASE
params.descr: Base part of origin URL. Markdown document path, specified in URL, is concatenated to the base

params.name: HEAD
params.descr: Content on <head> tag, added to resulting HTML document

name: S3 uploader
long_descr: The file can be sent to this application using POST or PUT. The application generates S3 signature for the file and uploads it to the configured S3 bucket. It returns the URL of the uploaded file

params.name: MAX_FILE_SIZE
params.descr: Max allowed file size in bytes

name: Validate JWT in Authorization header
short_descr: Validate JWT, passed in Authorization header in format "Bearer <token>"
long_descr: This app checks only token signature (using key from "secret" env var) and expiration, passed in "exp" token claim as UNIX time.

name: CDN Debug
short_descr: CDN Debugging utility including speedtest, headers viewer, and IP info.
long_descr: Displays detailed request diagnostics: incoming headers, Geo-IP data, edge PoP, timing breakdown, and a simple speedtest endpoint. Useful for verifying CDN routing and debugging edge behaviour.
